defects.description: top_nodes entries use abbreviated keys (t, r, cc, s, vc, cdc, ad, gl) instead of schema-defined names (title, repo, connectionCount, status, verificationCount, contradictionCount, authorityDepth, governanceLayer)
defects.remediation: Packet generator must use full field names matching schema v1.1.0

defects.description: by_verification_count entries include status field in schema but it is present in packet data as 's' key (minified)

conflicted_nodes_cross_check.conclusion: Packet data is STALE (pre-May-1 verification sweep). The 4 CONFLICTED nodes were resolved as tag-overlap false positives during the May 1 global verification sweep. Packet needs regeneration from current graph state.

known_bug_verification.claim: contradictionCount=39 is a tag-grouping artifact, not genuine contradiction
known_bug_verification.evidence: system_state.json shows 0 active contradictions; all 199 pre-sweep CONFLICTED nodes resolved as false positives; the 39 count matches tag-group overlap in the graph clustering algorithm
known_bug_verification.note: Bug is accurate but the underlying data has been resolved. The bug entry should be updated to reflect post-sweep status or closed if a new packet is generated.

stale_snapshot.impact: Packet does not reflect post-May-1 verification sweep results. All CONFLICTED status entries are outdated. Unverified count (186) is likely inflated.
